access_key.description: Gong generated access key. Used for HTTP Basic auth; never logged.

access_key_secret.description: Gong generated access key secret. Used for HTTP Basic auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Gong API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects created/started at or after this time are read.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
